allow: Bash(bash .specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Build an Agentic Research Assistant that accepts a natural-language research question, uses an LLM-powered reasoning loop to autonomously decide which tools to call \(Web Search via Tavily, Knowledge Base via FAISS, Synthesis\), and returns a structured response with cited answer, sources, confidence score, and decision trace." --json --short-name "core-research-agent")
